title: galium palustre elongatum
intro: Galium palustre elongatum, also known as tall marsh bedstraw, is a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Galium). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium palustre elongatum include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing swelling and pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although its preparation and use should be guided by a healthcare professional or herbalist.
